Class Room

java.lang.Object
Room
public class Room extends Object
Class for player information such as: Room name, descriptions, locked status, NPCs/Enemy, items.

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(String roomName, String roomDescription, String updatedRoomDescription)
      Constructs a new Room object with the details:
      Parameters:
      roomName - The name of the room
      roomDescription - The description which is displayed upon entering the room
      updatedRoomDescription - An updated room description for when a certain requirement has been met

      public String getRoomDescription()
      Check if the room has been completed and return either the original or updated room description.
      Returns:
      The room description to be displayed
